root_text.an5.59:1.3: Dullabho, bhikkhave, vuḍḍhapabbajito nipuṇo, dullabho ākappasampanno, dullabho bahussuto, dullabho dhammakathiko, dullabho vinayadharo.
root_text.an5.59:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato dullabho vuḍḍhapabbajitoti.

translation_text.an5.59:1.1: “Mendicants, it’s hard to find someone gone forth when old who has five qualities.
translation_text.an5.59:1.3: It’s hard to find someone gone forth when old who is sophisticated, well-presented, and learned, who can teach Dhamma, and has memorized the monastic law.
translation_text.an5.59:1.4: It’s hard to find someone gone forth when old who possesses these five qualities.”
